chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.452 of 2023 Fayyaz Ahmed Versus Noor Ahmed and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing (priority) case 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.5863/2023 (stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 12.02.2024 Mr. Muhammad Atiq Qureshi, Advocate for the appellant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the appellant submits that this appeal has become infructuous, as the purpose has already been served in view of modification in the impugned order by the learned single Judge. The appeal is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
